Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Refers to long bands or strips of fabric wrapped around the waist or worn over the shoulder or hips and typically tied, rather than secured with fasteners. They are worn as accessories, honorary symbols, or as part of a military uniform to denote rank or affiliation.

Úsese para designar una banda o cinta larga de tejido que se envuelve la cintura o que se lleva sobre el hombro o cadera anudado, más que afianzado con broches. Se lleva con un accesorio, símbolo honorífico, o como parte de un uniforme militar para denotar rango o afiliación.
Lange banden of repen stof die om het middel, de borst of de heupen worden gewikkeld en vastgemaakt; zonder sluitingen.
指長帶狀或長條狀織物，繞於腰上，或穿戴在肩膀或臀部上，且通常為繫住，而非以扣件固定。作為配件、榮譽象徵，或軍服的一部分，以標示階級或從屬關係。

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
2000010911/Detroit Art Registration and Information System Glossary (1980)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.; sashes
